Sage Bot Item Code: S28
Rock Crusher Sword

When attacking, has a [21%-23%] chance of restoring [10%-12%] health in self.
When attacking, the unit has a 40% chance to freeze the target for 3 sec. During this time, the target can't move or attack. It also increases the cooldown of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec.
Throughout the battle, when the unit attacks the frozen enemy unit, all frozen enemy units take 172000 pure damage.

Requirements: 98-100
